testcase.name: test_main
testcase.failure:

testcase.name: test_get_our_country
testcase.failure:
mock_requests_session = <MagicMock name='REQ_SESSION' id='4571742960'>
def test_get_our_country(mock_requests_session): mock_response = MagicMock() mock_response.text = 'loc=GB\nother=value' mock_requests_session.get.return_value = mock_response
> assert speedtest.get_our_country() == 'GB' E AssertionError: assert 'Unknown' == 'GB' E E - GB E + Unknown
tests/network_test.py:22: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_preamble_unit

failure.message: assert '1.2.3.4' in "Your IP:\t<MagicMock name='REQ_SESSION.get().result().headers.get()' id='4571750352'> (US)\nServer loc:\t<MagicMock n...ders.get()' id='4571750352'> (<MagicMock name='REQ_SESSION.get().result().headers.get()' id='4571750352'>) - (Unknown)"

testcase.failure:
mock_requests_session = <MagicMock name='REQ_SESSION' id='4571747328'>
def test_preamble_unit(mock_requests_session): mock_response = MagicMock() mock_response.headers = { 'cf-meta-ip': '1.2.3.4', 'cf-meta-colo': 'LAX', } mock_requests_session.get.return_value = mock_response
with patch('cf_speedtest.speedtest.get_our_country', return_value='US'): result = speedtest.preamble() > assert '1.2.3.4' in result E assert '1.2.3.4' in "Your IP:\t<MagicMock name='REQ_SESSION.get().result().headers.get()' id='4571750352'> (US)\nServer loc:\t<MagicMock n...ders.get()' id='4571750352'> (<MagicMock name='REQ_SESSION.get().result().headers.get()' id='4571750352'>) - (Unknown)"
tests/network_test.py:35: AssertionError
